channel.title: Extraterrestrial Visitation on Alien Truth Social
channel.description: Recent content in Extraterrestrial Visitation on Alien Truth Social

item.title: The Flying Saucers Are Real
item.description:
Donald Keyhoe’s 1950 book, The Flying Saucers Are Real, investigated United States Air Force reports of UFOs between 1947 and 1950. The book, which followed a similar article published in True magazine, popularized many ideas in ufology. Keyhoe argued that the Air Force had a policy of concealing UFO existence until 1949, after which it shifted to gradual revelation. He also contended that Earth had been visited by extraterrestrials for two centuries, with increased activity after the 1945 atomic bomb test.

Source: https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/The_Flying_Saucers_Are_Real
